name: Heavy-Duty Selective Racking
description: The most versatile pallet racking system offering 100% direct access to every pallet position. Ideal for warehouses with a wide variety of SKUs and frequent access requirements.

name: Drive-In / Drive-Through Racking
description: High-density storage system where forklifts drive directly into the racking lanes. Optional back beam enables Drive-Through configuration with FIFO rotation. Ideal for uniform SKUs.

name: Radio Shuttle Racking
description: Semi-automated high-density system using remote-controlled shuttle carts. Supports both FIFO and LIFO operations with excellent space utilization.
